## Checklist

- [ ] Maps to a JTBD (see `docs/vision/jobs-to-be-done.md`) **or** to an ADR-driven cleanup
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`bundle exec rspec`)
- [ ] Rubocop clean (`bin/rubocop`)
- [ ] **ADR-001:** no prescriptive language in new copy or LLM prompts (verbs of action directed at the user) — see [ADR-001](docs/architecture/adr/0001-descriptive-not-prescriptive-language.md)
- [ ] **Vision:** no fiscal-related additions (out of scope per `docs/vision/non-goals.md`)
- [ ] **No co-author attribution** in commit messages (per project convention)
- [ ] If new feature: discovery card was complete before starting (in the linked issue)
- [ ] If refactor of architecture: ADR exists or this PR creates one
